card.name: Blessed Eternity Yet Echoes
card.text: (At the start of the game, shuffle this card into Imago, a face-down pile.) Whenever you spend 6 or more mana to cast a spell or activate an ability, copy it. You may choose new targets for the copy.

card.text: (At the start of the game, shuffle this card into Imago, a face-down pile.) Untap up to two target permanents. Draw a card, or draw a card from Imago.

card.name: Never Forget Your Loyalties
card.text: (At the start of the game, shuffle this card into Imago, a face-down pile.) Each opponent sacrifices a creature. If you control a permanent with greater mana value than a creature sacrificed this way, draw a card, or draw a card from Imago.

card.text: (At the start of the game, shuffle this card into Imago, a face-down pile.) Whenever a nontoken Angel, Demon, Archon, or Merchant you control enters, create a token that's a copy of it and put a voice counter on A Chorus Before Our Thrones. {6}, Remove six counters from A Chorus Before Our Thrones and sacrifice it: You win the game.
